description: How requested diameters from process_selection map to catalogue tools and DB queries — mirrors 7. tool_selection.py. Tool geometry and per-tool Vc/fz stay in 7a. tool_database.json.

circular_interp.rule: Target tool D = bore_D × fraction; pick standard end mill size < bore_D minimizing |s − target|

contour_mill_boss.rule: Pick standard end mill < boss_D minimizing |s − target|; if none, smallest contour_mill in DB

counterbore_mill.rule: Prefer standard end mill within counterbore_exact_tol of cb_D; else largest standard ≤ cb_D

corner_r_pass.rule: Largest standard end mill ≤ max_diameter; else smallest available with warning

face_mill.rule: Smallest face_mill with diameter_mm ≥ feature_diameter; if feature unknown, smallest face mill; if feature larger than all, largest + multi-pass note

spot_drill.rule: Smallest tool where locates_holes_up_to_mm ≥ required_dia; operations spot_drill or center_drill; fallback largest spot/center with warning

twist_drill.rule: Exact DB match within drill_exact_match; else nearest standard_drill_sizes_mm with SUBSTITUTION note

chamfer_mill.rule: Smallest chamfer_mill with diameter_mm ≥ feature diameter

slot_mill.rule: Smallest slot_mill with diameter_mm ≥ slot width; resolution reuses counterbore-style standard list for non-slot fallback in code path — prefer slot_mill operation in DB

tap_rh.rule: tool_dia = nominal thread diameter; exact match to tap tool in DB; feed must equal pitch at CAM

boring_bar.rule: tool_dia = requested final bore diameter from step

mill_operations_smallest_fitting.rule: Candidates with diameter_mm ≥ required − drill_exact_tol; pick min diameter; else nearest
mill_operations_smallest_fitting.note: Applies to end mills, face mills, etc. per _query_tool()

warnings: NOT_FOUND step handling and ADD TO DATABASE messages are emitted in Python when no DB candidate exists.

LIVE (applied at import via _apply_tool_matching_policy): tolerances_mm.drill_exact_match, tolerances_mm.counterbore_endmill_exact, diameter_resolution.circular_interp.target_fraction, diameter_resolution.contour_mill_boss.target_fraction.

DOCUMENTATION ONLY (not yet globals): database_query_policy.spot_drill_db_operations, drill_operations_nearest_match, no_tool_steps — these policies are hardcoded inside functions in tool_selection.py, not module-level globals. Promote them to globals first, then extend _apply_tool_matching_policy to wire them.
